panel.title: Git Companion
panel.auth-error: Please authenticate to use this plugin, using {bin} auth login
panel.bin-not-installed: {bin} is not installed. Please install it to use this plugin.
panel.no-scope: Set a Group or Repository in Settings to view items assigned to you.
settings.platform.desc: Choose your git platform (Gitlab or Github).
settings.platform.label: Platform
settings.refreshInterval.desc: How often to refresh data, in seconds.
settings.refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval (s)
settings.repo.label: Repository
settings.repo.desc: Restrict to a specific repository (e.g. owner/repo). Leave empty to use Group.
settings.group.label: Group
settings.group.desc: GitLab group slug. Takes precedence over Repository when set.
settings.org.label: Organization
settings.org.desc: GitHub organization. Leave empty to search globally across all your repos.
